name: mostAmsSetSizePrefixed
title: mostAmsSetSizePrefixed
description: Configures the minimum length of an AMS message above which an initiating message with TelID==4 is sent.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel of the connected hardware interface.

description: Activate special size prefix length for exactly one AMS message.
Activate special size prefix length for AMS messages with more than 200 bytes payload.
